security.pillar1_desc: DFX is non-custodial. Your coins go directly to your own wallet. We never have access to your assets at any point.

security.pillar3_desc: DFX is based in Zug and is subject to the SRO regulations of the VQF. All processes are fully documented and audited.

wallets.metamask_desc: Use the DFX service to buy, sell or swap cryptocurrencies directly in your MetaMask with just a few clicks – fast, simple and decentralised.
wallets.rabby_desc: Buy directly into your Rabby Wallet with just a few clicks or sell your coins back to your bank account – without detours. Efficient. Secure. User-friendly.

wallets.trezor_desc: With DFX you trade directly via your Trezor wallet – buy, sell or swap, without a centralised provider in between.

news.card1: Binance Pay, SPAR & DFX.swiss partners enable crypto payments in over 100 Swiss stores
news.card2: As one of the main sponsors, DFX was present at the Kreuzlingen Fantastical and enabled visitors to pay with Bitcoin for the first time.
news.card3: Cyrill Thommen in conversation with Marc Steiner about Open CryptoPay at SPAR, the dEURO, the Euro stablecoin market and the dominance of USDT.
news.card4: Swiss politician Samuel Kullmann has just shopped at SPAR Thun with Bitcoin – the very first Bitcoin payment in this store.
news.card5:
DFX prints over 500 new QR codes for POS systems –
that means: Open CryptoPay is coming to even more SPAR stores in the region!
news.card6: In the Sound Money Bitcoin podcast, learn more about our payment solution at SPAR.
news.card7: Shop at SPAR with Binance Pay! Thanks to our partnership, you can easily pay with USDT using the Binance app.
news.card8: Jens Leinert shows in this hands-on video how easy it is to pay with Bitcoin in one of the first SPAR stores.
news.card9: Rahim Taghizadegan pays for the first purchase with Bitcoin in Switzerland – at a SPAR supermarket.

why.heading: Why use DFX?
why.card1_desc: You hold your crypto assets yourself in your wallet – with DFX you can buy, sell and swap worldwide and independently of crypto exchanges.
why.card2_desc: Anyone can review our code and contribute to security. DFX has also been audited and verified by Grant Thornton and Beyond Audit.
why.card3_desc: Get quick help and answers directly from our support team via ticket.
reviews.heading: Real opinions from real customers
faq.heading: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: What exactly does the DFX service include?
faq.a1: DFX is the bridge between the bank and the crypto space, enabling private and corporate customers to buy and sell cryptocurrencies. We are working to expand our offering to as many blockchains as possible.
faq.a2: DFX processes transactions from certain minimum amounts that vary by blockchain. In addition to DFX fees, there may be a blockchain fee. This fee is charged to pay for the blockchain transaction. The fee changes continuously and is displayed to the user on the interface at the time of purchase. We recommend that our customers first carry out a test transaction to get to know the service and how it works.
faq.q3: How quickly is my transaction processed?
faq.a3: On average, we estimate a processing time of approximately 10 minutes after payment is received at our bank. However, the duration depends on various factors, not all of which can be influenced by DFX.
faq.q4: Which payment methods does DFX accept?
faq.a4:
DFX accepts SEPA and SEPA Instant transfers. Whether a transfer is possible depends on whether the customer's bank participates in the SEPA payment area.

As a VQF member, DFX is subject to the due diligence obligations of the Swiss Anti-Money Laundering Act (AMLA). Business relationships with persons in jurisdictions listed by the FATF as high-risk jurisdictions cannot be entered into. The current classification can be viewed at https://fatf-gafi.org/en/countries/black-and-grey-lists.html.
faq.q5: Which currencies are supported by our service?
faq.a5: We accept CHF and EUR. For transactions exceeding CHF 50,000, alternative currencies are also accepted by arrangement. In this case, simply contact our Support.
faq.q6: What KYC, SoF and AML documentation is required and when?
faq.a6: KYC verification is mandatory for all transactions from CHF 1,000. The requirements for anti-money laundering (AML) and source of funds (SoF) are dynamic and depend on factors such as customer type, region and payment method.

sa.hero_sub: Swiss software infrastructure for fintech and digital assets. We develop scalable systems for modern financial and crypto applications.
sa.pos_title: Software, Strategy and Operations from Switzerland
sa.pos_desc1: We are a team of developers, strategists and operations specialists – focused on platform architecture, API design and production operations.
sa.pos_desc2: Our drive: fintech products that work in regulated environments – technically solid, scalable and market-ready.
sa.card1_text: Backend systems, APIs and cloud platforms – designed for high availability, built for regulated environments.
sa.card2_text: Strategic direction, roadmap planning and cross-functional coordination across the organisation.
sa.card3_text: Deployment, monitoring and continuous optimisation – keeping production systems stable and performant.
sa.timeline_sub: We provide support at every stage – from the initial idea to live operations.
sa.phase1_desc: Analyse requirements, define objectives, establish architecture.
sa.phase2_desc: Develop software, set up systems, organise teams.
sa.phase3_desc: 24/7 operations, monitoring and support – reliable day to day.
sa.phase4_desc: Evaluate data, improve processes, scale systems.
sa.swiss_sub: DFX Services AG is headquartered in Zug, operating to the highest standards. Transparency, structure and data protection are not promises, but our foundation.
sa.swiss1_text: Registered in the Canton of Zug – one of the world's leading hubs for fintech and blockchain.
sa.swiss2_text: All processes comply with Swiss regulatory requirements – fully documented and externally auditable.
sa.swiss3_text: Customer data is processed exclusively in Switzerland and is subject to the Swiss Data Protection Act (FADP).
sa.swiss4_text: Sustainable structures instead of short-term fixes – built for years of reliable operation and steady growth.
sa.cta_text: Questions about partnerships, technology or operational collaboration? We look forward to hearing from you.
sa.cta_note: DFX Services AG – Bahnhofstrasse 7, 6300 Zug, Switzerland.

DFX Toolbox –
The solution for seamless fiat-crypto integrations
toolbox.hero_sub: Add a fiat on-/off-ramp to your product. API and iFrame solution, 80+ coins, 15 blockchains. Integrated in minutes.
toolbox.feat1_desc: API and iFrame solution for your product
toolbox.code_title: Integrated in just a few minutes
toolbox.code_desc: Integrate our DFX Toolbox into your website and set up your on- and off-ramp in minutes with our seamless iFrame solution, or use our APIs for a deeper integration. Don't forget – everything we do is open source.
toolbox.biz_desc: Looking to take your digital asset project to the next level? We offer comprehensive support – from regulatory expertise to tailored technical solutions – for a smooth and successful launch.
toolbox.faq_a5: We accept CHF and EUR. For transactions exceeding CHF 50,000, alternative currencies are also accepted by arrangement. In this case, simply contact our Support.
taro.hero_title:
BTC Taro App –
Buy and hold Bitcoin securely
taro.hero_sub: Self-custody Bitcoin wallet with Lightning, MultiSig and on-chain. Buy directly in the app, pay at SPAR.
taro.feat1_desc: Supports Lightning payments, enabling fast, low-cost transactions and the use of your own LNDHub server.
taro.feat2_desc: Multi-device wallet for businesses. Set up a multi-sig wallet in just a few clicks and increase security, as transactions require joint approval.
taro.feat3_desc: You keep full control over your Bitcoin – store, receive and send it securely, without any additional dependencies.
taro.feat4_desc: BTC Taro Wallet supports LNURL payments and is compatible with Open CryptoPay – for example, for purchases at SPAR stores in Switzerland.
taro.steps_title: BTC in your wallet in just a few steps
taro.step1: After setting up the app, choose between an on-chain and a Lightning wallet.
taro.step3: Enter the purchase amount in EUR or CHF and select bank transfer as the payment method. A one-time KYC verification may be required.
taro.step4: After a successful deposit, you will receive your BTC in your wallet. Transaction times may vary depending on the payment method.
taro.benefit1_desc: The BTC Taro Wallet cleverly combines the best of both worlds: the security and independence that Bitcoin holders value, with features like on-/off-ramp and multi-device wallet that make it even more versatile.
taro.benefit2_desc: Just like the Blue Wallet, the BTC Taro Wallet is fully open source. This means the entire code is publicly accessible – for maximum transparency, trust and security. Developers and the community can review, improve and customise the code.
taro.benefit3_desc: SEPA Instant, SEPA, SWIFT, SIC or eSIC – use these payment methods to buy Bitcoin directly into your BTC Taro Wallet or have payouts sent to your bank account.

faqpage.hero_title: DFX FAQ – How to buy crypto: guides and answers
faqpage.ref_q1: How can I become a DFX customer?
faqpage.ref_a1: Opening an account at DFX is only possible via referral. You need either the referral code, the referral link or the email address of an existing customer. This person serves as your point of contact and must additionally confirm their referral. Once this confirmation is received, you can complete your onboarding and start using your DFX account.
faqpage.ref_a2: A referral code is your personal code at DFX. When someone registers via your code or referral link and successfully completes the KYC process, the connection is automatically recognised.
faqpage.ref_a3: Referrals can be made by any customer who already holds an account at DFX.
faqpage.ref_q4: Why does DFX only accept new customers by referral?
faqpage.ref_a4: DFX relies on a referral system to ensure a safe and trustworthy environment. New customers can only open an account through an existing customer who already uses and trusts DFX. This makes onboarding safer, prevents misuse and preserves the quality of our community in the long term.
faqpage.ref_q5: What risks in the crypto space should I be aware of beforehand?
faqpage.ref_a5: The crypto market is highly volatile, and losses can occur quickly. Common mistakes include sending cryptocurrency to the wrong address, losing access credentials or clicking on phishing links. Furthermore, fraudulent projects and an ever-changing legal framework pose additional risks. A basic understanding of the processes helps to avoid these mistakes and navigate the crypto world more safely.
faqpage.ref_q6: What happens if the referral is not confirmed?
faqpage.ref_a6: If your referral is not confirmed by your contact person, your onboarding is considered incomplete and an account cannot be set up.
faqpage.ref_q7: Can I complete onboarding without a referral?
faqpage.ref_a7: No. Onboarding at DFX is only possible via a referral. You need the referral code, referral link or email address of an existing customer who confirms your registration.
faqpage.ref_a8: Yes. You can refer as many people as you like. You will be credited for each successfully completed registration.
faqpage.ref_q9: How can I retrieve my referral code as an existing customer?
faqpage.ref_a9:
1. Log into your DFX account: https://app.dfx.swiss/login – Using your wallet address known to DFX or your email address.

2. Open the account menu: On the DFX Ramp page, go to the menu (≡) and select "Account".

3. Check requirements: Scroll past the "Activity" section, scroll past the "KYC" section and make sure your KYC level 50 is verified.

4. Check active wallet address: Your active wallet address must be displayed in the dropdown field. If not, select it.

5. Retrieve RefCode and RefLink: Under "Referral", your RefCode is displayed. Click the red copy icon to copy the RefLink to your clipboard.

6. Share RefLink: Share the link with interested parties via copy & paste.
faqpage.iban_q1: How do I generate my personal IBAN?
faqpage.iban_a1:
You can create your personal IBAN directly in your DFX account.
A step-by-step guide and video will follow.
faqpage.iban_a2: Each user can generate one IBAN per currency in CHF and EUR. Creating multiple IBANs in the same currency is not possible.
faqpage.iban_a3: The new bank is YAPEAL, based in Switzerland.
faqpage.iban_q4: What is possible after the switch to the new bank?
faqpage.iban_a4: After the switch, your personal IBAN is available for all transactions: deposits and standing orders can then be processed directly via your new IBAN.
faqpage.iban_q5: What can I use my new personal IBAN for?
faqpage.iban_a5:
You can use your personal IBAN exclusively for transactions with DFX. This includes deposits and standing orders related to your DFX.swiss account.
Payments unrelated to DFX cannot be made via this IBAN.
faqpage.iban_q6: Do I need to change anything in my existing settings?
faqpage.iban_a6: Yes, you need to update your previously saved bank details or standing orders to your new personal IBAN, as payments to the old bank details will no longer be processed.
faqpage.iban_q7: Where do I transfer my standing orders to?
faqpage.iban_a7: Generate your personal IBAN for this purpose. All future transfers and standing orders must be made to this account.
faqpage.iban_q8: What happens if I continue to transfer to the old bank details (Maerki & Baumann)?
faqpage.iban_a8: Transfers to Maerki Baumann will no longer be possible in the future. Log into your DFX account and generate your personal IBAN. All transfers must now be made to this account. Deposits to Maerki Baumann cannot be processed and will be automatically returned to your bank account.
faqpage.iban_q9: Are there any costs for the personal IBAN?
faqpage.iban_a9:
Generating your personal IBAN is free of charge.
A flat fee of 1 € / 1 CHF applies per transaction (plus the usual standard fees).
Details can be found in our fee schedule.
